headline: How Algeria tried to erase the two suicide attacks during Pope Leo's visit
subhead: Two men blew themselves up on Monday about 40 kilometers from Algiers, without causing any casualties other than themselves. Authorities sought to impose silence on the failed terrorist attack from the official narrative of the historic visit.

subhead: The head of The Shift Project think tank, which has released a 'Robust Plan for the French Economy,' says that citizens have yet to fully grasp the benefits of moving away from fossil fuels.

headline: Kanye West postpones Marseille concert after France considers blocking him from performing
subhead: The US rapper postponed his concert in Marseille after he was blocked from entering the UK over antisemitic remarks and voicing admiration for Adolf Hitler.

headline: Calder at the Fondation Louis Vuitton in Paris, a festive experience
subhead: The exhibition spans the sculptor's entire body of work and takes over the entire building, spilling out onto the exterior. The journey is a joyful celebration, filled with lightness and movement.

headline: 'At that price, how can we accept?' Trump Organization's Vietnam golf project sparks protests and corruption allegations
subhead: Signed just before the 2024 US presidential election, the project has caused divisions within the government and sparked anger among local residents, who have been offered extremely low compensation for the seizure of their land.

headline: One year ahead of French presidential election, survey shows deep desire for change
subhead: Following the municipal elections, the political landscape is marked by a favorable perception of the far-right Rassemblement National and by highly polarized preferences among French voters, a Le Monde survey shows.
